---
title: "Sentences"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Sentences
1. Be able to define the following terms: *syntax*, *constituent*
1. Be able to locate Broca's area and Wernicke's area on an image of the brain
1. Explain the difference between *functional specialization* and *functional specificity*
1. Describe evidence for the following claim: Broca's region is not dedicated exclusively to language processing

:::

| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Sentences ↗</span> |  SGN Ch. 9: *Building dependencies* <br> Dronkers & Baldo (2009) | Matchin, Sprouse, & Hickok (2014) |




<!-- Mentimeter>


<!-- Skip 
- SGN Ch. 7: *Structure and prediction* 
- SGN Ch. 8: *Composing sentences*
- Kim & Osterhout (2005)
- Bemis & Pylkkanen (2011?)
-->
